exports.name: ang_diff
exports.description: Shortest signed angle from current to target, in [-pi, pi]. Positive = target is clockwise.

exports.name: clamp
exports.signature: clamp(v: float, lo: float, hi: float) -> float
exports.description: Clamp v to the inclusive range [lo, hi].

exports.name: lerp
exports.signature: lerp(a: float, b: float, t: float) -> float

exports.name: pid
exports.signature: pid(error: float, kp: float, ki: float, kd: float, integral: float, prev_error: float) -> (output: float, integral: float, prev_error: float)
exports.description: Single PID step. Returns (output, updated_integral, current_error).

sensors.description: Raycast distances to nearest obstacle in 8 directions, in pixels (0-250).

target_bearing.description: Signed angle from car heading to finish zone center, in [-pi, pi]. 0 = car points at goal. Positive = goal is clockwise.

update_return.description: (alpha1, alpha2) — angular accelerations for left and right wheels.
